immutability_policy: The exact configuration bytes identified by config_sha256 are the only accepted Calibration Configuration v1. Any edit requires a new config version and a new acceptance envelope.
acceptance_method: SHA-pinned P0-R3 through P0-R6 source verification, exact 20-field calibration_configs projection, canonical embedded JSON round-trip, deterministic byte reproduction, worked regression fixtures, mutation/draft/incomplete rejection, and Python/Unity parity.

timing_limitation.statement: The accepted operational timing contract does not relabel either rejected strict distribution candidate as passing and does not claim universal physical 1000 Hz delivery.

production_authorization: Phase 0 configuration dependency is unblocked. Production code may consume only this SHA-pinned accepted configuration through a complete immutable loader; production Test Engine implementation has not yet begun.
